creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I found the same (symptoms with check boxes etc.) following a recent round of updates to FreeBSD-CURRENT. 

Not limited to Firefox; Remmina and various other applications are affected. 

Affected themes include Breeze. I imagine that there's already a bug report somewhere. 

Worked around here with Greybird theme for GTK2 and GTK3. YMMV.
